lines.speaker: Elena
lines.text: Not bad. I won't lie though, the stuff you told me about elves and dark lords is all a bit frightening.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I know. I'm working on it though, by the time I'm done we'll never have to worry about any of this again.

lines.speaker: Elena
lines.text: I hope you're right. Be careful out there, I worry about you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll be fine Elena, don't you worry.

lines.speaker: Elena
lines.text: Well it just so happens that by freak accident, I had hundreds delivered the other day!
